ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Greedeks/GTweak
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LorisYounger/VPet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LorisYounger/VPet
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RMC-14/RMC-14
Language: c%23
RMC-14 is an asymmetric PvP game that runs on Robust Toolbox.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Unity-Technologies/ml-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Unity-Technologies/ml-agents
Language: c%23
The Unity Machine Learning Agents Toolkit (ML-Agents) is an open-source project that enables games and simulations to serve as environments for training intelligent agents using deep reinforcement learning and imitation learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aelassas/servy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aelassas/servy
Language: c%23
Professional-Grade Windows Service Wrapper with Deep Observability - Modern Alternative to NSSM, WinSW & FireDaemon Pro

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/aws-lambda-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/aws-lambda-dotnet
Language: c%23
Libraries, samples and tools to help .NET Core developers develop AWS Lambda functions.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/AspNetCore.Docs
Language: c%23
Documentation for ASP.NET Core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/SqlClient
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/SqlClient
Language: c%23
Microsoft.Data.SqlClient provides database connectivity to SQL Server for .NET applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: files-community/Files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/files-community/Files
Language: c%23
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lepoco/wpfui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lepoco/wpfui
Language: c%23
WPF UI provides the Fluent experience in your known and loved WPF framework. Intuitive design, themes, navigation and new immersive controls. All natively and effortlessly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
Language: c%23
mRemoteNG is the next generation of mRemote, open source, tabbed, multi-protocol, remote connections manager.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/garnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/garnet
Language: c%23
Garnet is a remote cache-store from Microsoft Research that offers strong performance (throughput and latency), scalability, storage, recovery, cluster sharding, key migration, and replication features. Garnet can work with existing Redis clients.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spectreconsole/spectre.console
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spectreconsole/spectre.console
Language: c%23
A .NET library that makes it easier to create beautiful console applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/studyzy/imewlconverter
Language: c%23
